title: Why am I being asked to enter my preferred spoken and written language?
meta-title: Why am I being asked to enter my preferred spoken and written language?
meta-description: Entering this information will help the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) better understand and improve the health and health care for all Americans.
title-short: Why am I being asked to enter my preferred spoken and written language?
bite: Entering this information will help the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) better understand and improve the health and health care for all Americans.
page_name: Why am I being asked to enter my preferred spoken and written language?
page_topic: Why am I being asked to enter my preferred spoken and written language?
excerpt: Entering this information will help the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) better understand and improve the health and health care for all Americans. Providing this information won’t impact your eligibility for health coverage, your health plan options, or your costs in any way.
